title: gladiolus mariae
intro: Gladiolus mariae, also known as the sword lily, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Iridaceae family, characterized by its vibrant and showy inflorescences. Traditionally, Gladiolus mariae has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery, due to its emetic and purgative effects. The plant is also valued for its health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in wound healing and reduce fever. In herbal preparations, Gladiolus mariae is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a qualified practitioner.
